title: Bowery to Broadway
writer: Bart Lytton, Edmund Joseph, Arthur T. Horman
actors: Maria Montez, Jack Oakie, Susanna Foster
plot: In the Gay 90s, Michael O'Rourke (Jack Oakie) and Dennis Dugan (Donald Cook) are owners of rival night spots in the Bowery. They both move uptown and continue to compete in establishments, each tossing many trials and tribulations...
